/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/compilers/bin/nvc++ -march=x86-64-v3 -fast -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/comm_libs/13.0/hpcx/hpcx-2.24/ompi/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread CMakeFiles/awave.dir/h5io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/parallel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/init_sos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/ufield.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/wave_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/wave_cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/awave.dir/main.cpp.o -o awave   -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/cuda/13.0/lib64  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/math_libs/13.0/lib64  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/comm_libs/13.0/nccl/lib  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/comm_libs/13.0/nvshmem/lib  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/cuda/13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/cuda/13.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/25.9/comm_libs/13.0/hpcx/hpcx-2.24/ompi/lib/libmpi.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt
